vulnerability.reference: Instructors and institutions blindly trust detector outputs, ignoring high false positive/negative rates due to adversarial perturbations.
vulnerability.generated: Educators and institutions depend on detectors that cannot verify semantic properties or provide provable guarantees against adversarial evasion.

impact.reference: Wrongful accusations penalize honest students; undetected AI use devalues academic credentials, eroding institutional trust.
impact.generated: Undetectable machine-written submissions degrade academic integrity, devaluing credentials and eroding institutional trust.

dose_response.reference: Semantic undecidability allows adversarial perturbations that fool AI text detectors, causing educators to blindly trust flawed outputs, leading to wrongful accusations and erosion of academic trust.
dose_response.generated: Semantic undecidability of compositional threats, via educators' reliance on AI-generated text detectors, triggers dependence on detectors without verifiable semantic guarantees, leading to undetectable machine-written submissions that degrade academic integrity, devalue credentials, and erode institutional trust.
